admission_process.title: The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University admission 2025 is based on the entrance exam. The True School of Music offers BPA, BFA and BTech courses at the UG level. Candidates looking for admission should appear for a university-based entrance exam called VUSAT forThe True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University course admissions 2025.The eligibility criteria for all the courses is to pass Class 12.

The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University admissions are based on entrance exams for various courses. The basic eligibility criteria set by the college is to pass Class 12. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forThe True School of Music courses:
Read More:Vijaybhoomi University Brochure

VSD admission process includes online application submission, application scrutiny by the admission committee and the VUSAT aptitude test for admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at The True School of Music:
STEP 1: VSD Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college, i.e., https://admissions.vijaybhoomi.edu.in/application-form. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The True School of Music shortlists candidates based on a university-level entrance exam called VUSAT. The college will display a provisional merit list after concluding the admission interview. After clearing all the above-mentioned rounds, candidates will receive an admission letter.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theTrue School of Music feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.answer: Yes, students can pursue BTech at The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University. The university offers a full-time BTechcourse of a four-year duration. faqs.answer: To get into The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University for BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate. The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on entrance-exam.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for BTech admission at The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who are looking for BTech course admission at The True School of Music need to sit and appear for VUSAT entrance exam (university-level entrance exam) followed by admission interview. The BTech courses are offered at the UG level. The common eligibility for the course is Class 12 with a 50% aggregate.

placement_data.title: The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Recently, The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University has recently released the average salaries offered to the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the average global package offered during The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University placements 2024 stood at INR 85 LPA , whereas the average domestic package offered stood at INR 13.30 LPA . The participating recruiters presented various new-age job offers to the students of the batch 2024. The top recruiters of The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University, Mumbai in 2024 included Oracle, Arcesium, Dell, HDFC Bank, KPMG, Wipro, SAP Labs, Schneider Electric, Hexaware Technologies, Federal Bank, Classic Legends, Berkadia , etc.

The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University has a full-fledged placement cell that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at The True School of Music, Vijaybhoomi University includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. Students undergo a series of workshops, guest lectures, seminars, and simulation exercises to become ready to meet the ever-changing corporate challenges.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is the temple of excellence for the students.

review_content.Placements: The placement for our batch is not well, but our senior batch, the placements are good in the leading companies. The companies like Sony, Infosys, Systek, Mahindra, etc., visit the college for the placement. The students got 3-6 LPA package from the companies. Around, 55%-60% of the students got the internship. The average stipend is Rs. 13,000 per month. There is a placement cell, which is helpful to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in the green campus. The buildings of the college are well-interior. The students take all the facilities from the college, which are well-maintained by the college staff. The college has the classrooms, library, canteen, sports ground, indoor sports, Wi-Fi, labs, etc. There is 24*7 power back-up in the college. The hostel rooms for the students are good, and we enjoyed our hostel life in that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good college for average students.

content.Placements: Recently, several IT companies visited the college for placements. Among which Sony, Genpact, Systweak Support, Vodafone are the major hiring companies. In 2016, 45 students were selected in Vodafone and seven students in Sony. The placement percentage is always average in the college. Last year, it was 45%. reviews_list.review_title: Government Engineering College, Godhra is a good college.

review_content.Placements: There is almost 85% placement in our college. Almost 30-40 companies come for placements and hired students. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Many companies visit our college to recruit B.Tech civil engineering students. Almost 100% of students got internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities like huge classrooms, a lab for practicals, a huge workshop, a stationery shop, etc. Our canteen and mess are hygienic and clean.
content.Faculty: All teachers are educated and very humble. They always support us. They provide us with some extra notes to score good marks in exams. Semester exams are difficult. We can pass exams easily with teachers' guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is affordable, but it has some drawbacks.

content.Placements: The placement situation is not very good in the civil engineering department. There is no guarantee for placement fairs to be held. Under government or university guidelines, when placement fairs are conducted, approximately 1.2 Lacs annual packages are offered by companies of different fields. The packages depend on your capabilities.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and labs are in good condition. Wi-Fi connection is available in almost every building. The condition of hostels is not so good, and we face problems with water and food. Sports facilities like volleyball, badminton, and cricket are available in our college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice, a student has all facility that he or she needs in a college and hostel. individual_reviews.title: Placements are provided in 2022 but there is no maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities like huge classrooms, a lab for practicals, a huge workshop, a stationery shop, etc. Our canteen and mess are hygienic and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is affordable, but it has some drawbacks.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are in good condition. Wi-Fi connection is available in almost every building. The condition of hostels is not so good, and we face problems with water and food. Sports facilities like volleyball, badminton, and cricket are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Government Engineering College, Godhra is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice, a student has all facility that he or she needs in a college and hostel. Air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi services, and a library with a proper book facility are available in our campus. There is  mess, canteen, and a Maggi hotspot for  food facility. All have good food with proper hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are provided in 2022 but there is no maintenance.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper maintenance of labs in our college. The hostel condition is very poor. We face problems with water and cleanliness every day. There is no proper mess. We have a drinking water issue. The classrooms are in poor condition. No equipment works in the lab. Wi-Fi works but students face a lot of problems due to weak network.

reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college with great cleanliness and kind teachers.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi is available for free of cost for every student. Classrooms are completely digitalised, and the cleanliness of classrooms and the college is excellent. The library has almost every book, and it gives 2 books per student. They provide new books according to students' demand every year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a low fee, so it is perfect for those students who cannot afford high fees
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, and you will enjoy every moment here. Although all the government colleges in Gujarat have the same design structure, the infrastructure of our college is unique. It is the last government college which has been built, so it is not much old. The library and classrooms are also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good but the canteen and water facilities is bad sometimes during monsoon
reviews.review_text: Yes, government provide wi-fi facility and it is helpful for students. There is also one library, which is very clean and atmosphere is good in library for reading. And all sports games are organized every year in February month so all girls and boys participate in the sports games.

reviews.review_heading: Our teaching faculty members are good, but some students do not come to the class.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only on the campus. The library gives only two books where the camera is not working, but fans and lights are running. Quality of food is better when sir and teachers are coming to our hostel mess. In the afternoon and at night, food quality is bad, and roti is also bad.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities are available here, but the college is located in a rural area.
reviews.review_text: In Government Engineering College, Godhra, a total of 12 buildings are built named administration department, aminity block, library, civil department, mechanical department, electrical department, electronics and communication department, boys hostel, girls hostel, staff quarter, principals bungalow and workshop.

reviews.review_heading: Our course and infrastructure are very nice.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in our department. Labs are also available. Classrooms and library are also available in our department. In the hostel, in a room, 3 beds are available for 3 students. The electricity is provided here. Quality of the food served in the mess is average. Canteen is available in our college, but all kinds of food or packets are not available. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: All necessary facilities provided with highly qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All most every facility is provided by our college. Good supporting staff members. Classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs and library facility are too good in our college. Our college also support government hostel, good mess facility even at night. Sports in our college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure, but I am disappointed with hostel facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Quality of food is the worst, and there is no cleanliness and hygiene. We have suffered from lots of things. We don't want to live in the hostel, but due to lack of money, we have to survive. Overall, infrastructure is good, but the maintenance is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities provided by our college and principal are good.
reviews.review_text: Our staff provides almost good facilities. Classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs and library facility are very good in our college. Our college also supports government hostel. Mess facilities are good, and at night time also they provide us with food. Sports in our college are also good.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good staff, especially for the mechanical engineering department.
reviews.review_text: The college has everything a student needs, including a huge library with all the required books and a systematic approach to it. Wi-Fi in the college is functioning most of the time. Classrooms are clean. There is also a table tennis court. Cricket, volleyball, badminton and several other sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely the best government engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Every batch has separate classrooms in our college. Wi-Fi networks are also available for students and faculty members. There are a library, canteen, and sports room, and every department has different seminar halls and computer labs. The college has separate hostels for boys and girls with mess facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

faqs.answer:
A:    V.S.M College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P.

reviews.review_heading: There is no dissatisfaction with faculty members and placement offers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library are very good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The medical facilities available at the college are good. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: There is no dissatisfaction with faculty members and placement offers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well. The quality of the facility in our hostel is good. The food available in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are good, and sports and games are also nice.

reviews.review_heading: There is no dissatisfaction regarding the faculty or the placement offers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, are very good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. The medical facilities available are good, and the sports and games facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall story of my college.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college for day scholars, but there is no hostel facility for boys. The hostel facilities are only available for girls, with special air conditioning. Labs are good for some courses, classrooms are normal, and the library has books with perfect skill-based knowledge. Sports are held once per week.

reviews.review_heading: Worth joining. It is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and infrastructure are good. They also provide Wi-Fi. Labs and libraries are also good enough. The quality of food available in the canteen is good and tasty. Medical facilities are also there. Sports and games are also held. They take us outside to play.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and decent. The college provides a Wi-Fi. The classrooms are clean and look good. Our college has a library having different types of books which are very useful for the students. Our college has a hostel with a reasonable fee and doubtless security. The hostel food is not so bad and there are some canteens where we can eat if we don’t like the hostel food. The college has good medical facilities for the students along with a big ground to play game...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very beautiful and unique. Our college has a library with well-stocked books, journals, and competitive books. Our college also has a hostel; the rooms are very clean with high security, and the hostel food is also good. Our college has a large ground, where all the students play sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: There is no dissatisfaction from the college management.
reviews.review_text: Sports and games are conducted very well. Medical facilities in our college are not bad as compared to other colleges. Hostel facilities are good and quality of food is nice. Mess and canteen are maintained neatly. Classes and laboratories are good to learn things.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides separate hostels for boys and girls. Around 5 students can share each hostel room. Hostel rooms are well-equipped with beds, bathrooms, etc. The food served in the hostel is good. Our classrooms and labs are the best.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college as compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Management provides laboratories for 3 -6 periods a week. They provide systems for software and hardware laboratories. Canteen food is also better for an affordable price. Good facilities are provided in the hostel, but the cost is high.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, good placements in 2017, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: On campus, a computer lab and decent classrooms are available. I am a day scholar. In the canteen, they offer good food, and meals are available. Sports like cricket, basketball, and volleyball are conducted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Its really good college facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The labs are very good. The classrooms are good and it has CC cameras. One classroom has one projector also there. The library is also very nice in our college. My friend is staying in a hostel its good for girls and boys also and it has a separate hostel. Some sports and games are very useful. Mess canteen is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is Good & classes are on going well, bus facility is good but charges very high for short distances & Hostel for boys is waste of money for girls is better, canteen facility is super I like chocolates, samosa is my favorite & hostel food is a waste not value for money.

reviews.review_heading: Review of V.S.M College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and student-friendly, with lots of trees. There is a huge ground, and no Wi-Fi is provided to students in our college. Labs are good, and classrooms are average. The library is good and needs to improve by adding more books. The hostel is not good and the food is not good. There are no medical facilities. Sports and games are encouraged in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college campus, but placements are good.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a hostel for students with good food and water facilities. The library has only a few books that we need. We can find other authors' books for reference purposes. They provide labs and workshops frequently.

faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?

answer.text: Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:IT & SoftwareProduct DevelopmentE-Commerce and Digital CommerceCloud Computing & AIData Science & AnalyticsBanking and FinTechAutomotiveHealthcareUseful Link: BTech CSE Career Scope

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?

answer.text: Many top international companies having presence in India hire electrical engineers and offer them handsome salary packages. Some of the top recruiters are given here:Larson & ToubroTata Electric CompaniesSterlingSchneider ElectricCrompton GreavesSiemensExide Industries LimitedMellcon Engineers

faqs.question: What are some of the top recruiters hiring Electrical Engineers?

answer.text: The BTech CSE syllabus is incomplete without regular lab classes and internship programs because of the importance of programming, software development, and AI and ML knowledge required in the CSE field, which cannot be taught only through theory classes.Premier institutes often collaborate with leading industrial partners to provide their students with the best internship exposure and training opportunities, which may act as an entry point to excellent earning opportunities later. For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Trimurti Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 36.12, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 10 students were placed out of 54. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, while the highest was 9 LPA. The top recruiting company was Tech Mahindra. Around 60% of students got internships. The best role offered was project assistant at Tech Mahindra.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were well-ventilated and comfortable classrooms. There was a canteen, a small basketball court, and a garden. There were dedicated labs for major subjects, and the library had a huge collection of books. The hostel was quite good according to the fee. There were no medical facilities except first aid.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Check the placement records of the last 5 years of the college before taking admission.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, only 5 toppers were asked for direct interviews, and the rest 30+ students were required to clear the aptitude test. Only 3 of them cleared it and were given a chance for the interview. 4 of the toppers and 1 of the other students got placed in TCS, and the rest were left to seek a job on their own. So, the placement rate is not even 10%. Since TCS was the only hiring company, the package offered was 3.25 LPA for all the students. No other company came for us. No internship was offered. The students who got placed were recruited as assistant engineers.

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology - HCET is one of the most respected institutes in India in all three states: engineering, technology, and the kind of quality education for which competency is being produced in this institute. It was established in 1994. The college still expects commitment towards providing quality education and competent graduates from this institute. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, with courses accredited by national bodies. Modern infrastructural facilities, experienced faculty, and a strong focus on research and innovation are the characteristics of the college. The placement cell meets all the demands of the students and enhances its reputation by successfully connecting students with the front-end companies. HCET gets active participation in technical and cultural events, which also lets it achieve recognition in the educational sector.
faqs.question: Q: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) a known institute?

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh is a good college. Some key points to consider:HCET is one of the oldest private engineering institutes in the region .The college has experienced faculty members, which is a big advantage for the students. Even though the college has a placement cell, the record could be improved further. Few students have complained that the campus life is not as happening as it should be. Student reviews on platforms like Shiksha are great to get first-hand insights into the college experience.Overall, HCET is a good option for engineering and management studies in the region; however, one has to weigh their priorities before making a decision.
faqs.question: Q: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) good?

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, HCET is known for its quality education, standards of state-of-the-art facilities, and putting strong emphasis on practical learning. The college provides a range of engineering programmes accredited by the appropriate bodies that ensure and maintain high academic standards of the courses. The teaching members are highly qualified with many having industry experience. They provide the students with valuable insight and mentorship. HCET also owes its success to a strong placement cell that has always provided jobs to the fresh graduates at the top-level companies. The college also promotes extracurricular and technical events among the students, thus creating an all-round environment to be further enhanced.

review_summary.college_name: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement percentage of our college is 40%, but because of the recession, it goes to less than 15%. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Atos, Capgemini, Soft Solution, etc. Many students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-designed. Our college has 3 floors. The library has many books related to all courses. Our college has a canteen. The food served in the canteen is good. The hostel facility is available in our college. The hostel is clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).

content.Placements: In our college, almost 60% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 9.6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Cognizant visited our campus. Almost 80% of students got internships. Top roles offered were assistant project executive, team leader, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was classy. The library was full of technical books. Wi-Fi was a little slow at that time. Classrooms were well-ventilated and open while every major subject had a dedicated lab of itself. The hostel had good infrastructure, spacious rooms, and proper security. The mess owner was student-friendly, and the food served was hygienic. Medical facilities were not available. There was a basketball ground and there was also an amphitheater.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 10 students were placed out of 54. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, while the highest was 9 LPA. The top recruiting company was Tech Mahindra. Around 60% of students got internships. The best role offered was project assistant at Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: There were well-ventilated and comfortable classrooms. There was a canteen, a small basketball court, and a garden. There were dedicated labs for major subjects, and the library had a huge collection of books. The hostel was quite good according to the fee. There were no medical facilities except first aid.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Check the placement records of the last 5 years of the college before taking admission.

content.Placements: In my batch, only 5 toppers were asked for direct interviews, and the rest 30+ students were required to clear the aptitude test. Only 3 of them cleared it and were given a chance for the interview. 4 of the toppers and 1 of the other students got placed in TCS, and the rest were left to seek a job on their own. So, the placement rate is not even 10%. Since TCS was the only hiring company, the package offered was 3.25 LPA for all the students. No other company came for us. No internship was offered. The students who got placed were recruited as assistant engineers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, facilities and hard-working faculty members.

content.Placements: More than 50% of the students get placed already, and the placements are still going on. I cannot make out the exact number, but the students are satisfied with their placements. The minimum salary package offered is 1.8 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. The best companies like TCS and Wipro visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The department has fully equipped computer labs. I did not use the hostel facility, so I do not have much idea about it. I would still recommend the facilities offered by the institution hostel.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was classy. The library was full of technical books. Wi-Fi was a little slow at that time. reviews.review_text:
The classrooms were good. But there was no Wi-Fi. There were no machines in labs. The faculty members just put pressure on students. The librarian doesn't want to work. You have to stand for at least 1 hour to get a book (maximum 4 books) issued. At the time of return, they just misplace the books to add it up to your fine.
I didn't opt for the hostel or food facilities, as I live nearby. But my friends lived there. The college hostel was poor and expensive, so even the girls rented a room outsi...

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, facilities and hard-working faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The department has fully equipped computer labs. I did not use the hostel facility, so I do not have much idea about it. I would still recommend the facilities offered by the institution hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good college. But as most of the teachers left it is not in good condition.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good facilities. We had elevators, parking & other basic amenities that were well-managed. There was a well-equipped computer centre. Classrooms were also good & well maintained. The entire campus was covered with CCTV, which makes it safe. Our college had a good & clean cafeteria. The campus was clear & clean. We had indoor & outdoor sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: HCET Jabalpur is the best college to have a better future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is always available, and every floor has 3 laboratories and libraries. Classrooms can accommodate 150-200 students at a time. There are air-conditioned classrooms and libraries. Hostels are available for students, and some of our friends stayed in the hostels. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, which are around at 600 yards far from each other. The food facility is good, and 24x7 water and electricity facility is available. Wi-Fi facility is provided for educational pu...

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is top-class. There isn't a college in Jabalpur which is as smartly built like ours. Labs are not much used here, but the equipment available there is quite old. Even the food served is good. The only issue with the infrastructure is the campus houses College of Architecture and Dental hospital too. Otherwise, the campus would be scenic.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).
reviews.review_text: The college has a unique infrastructure, and one can really admire it. As various departments are allocated different buildings and each building is interconnected, students can go from 1 to other building through different floors of the building. Even our canteen is amazing, and it is situated by the side of the lake.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was well maintained. There are fully equipped labs, computer centre, library, photocopy and printing machines, and cafeteria, etc. But there was no playground. The food served was not bad and similar to what is offered by any hostel canteen. Hostel rooms were spacious enough and worth for the money paid. It was around Rs. 50,000 per year for hostel including food.

reviews.review_heading: A college which turned into dust by the administration.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent. Our computer rooms are air-conditioned. Sports facilities were good until my 2nd year. After that, the college turned off most of the activities as every one in the board of directors and administration panel were least happy to run the college. Everything was good until 2012, but the facilities and almost all the other things went in bad shape after that.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are not good, and placements are poor.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Classrooms are not that good, but okay. There is no medical facility. However, there is a dental college besides the college to provide medical facilities. Sports activities conducted in the college are good. Sports like badminton, cricket, and table tennis are available. Quality of food served is okay. Hostels are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: There are good facilities in our college, but due to bad management, I am dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus for students. The library and labs are good, all machines and instruments are available in labs. In sports and games, badminton court is good at our college. Medical facilities are also available in our college as dental college is near to our college. The quality of classrooms is average. The canteen is superb, and the quality of food in it is good. The hostel rooms are very good. I can say that this is the best hostel in Jabalpur at a very effectiv...

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are pretty clean and well-furnished with cameras and green boards. The labs are great. A lot of old instruments are available like Lathe. Food is available in the canteen. Good hostel rooms are available with good facilities. There is a little issue with infrastructure like watercoolers are not good, and there is no AC. During summer it is difficult to study.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure among other colleges in the town. The campus has a 5-story building, 2 elevators, classy canteen, auditorium, badminton hall, centralised library, well-equipped computer lab, volleyball court, separate vehicle parking areas for students and faculty members, and bus facilities from every corner of the town.

review_summary.college_name: Prakasam Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Affordable College with Nice Infrastructure. #PEC.

content.Placements: As a final year student, I recently got placed where around 300 people were shortlisted based on their percentage and 70 students including me got the offer letter. That's around 25 percent of placements and many other companies are also visiting our college in the upcoming days till now. Companies like IBM and Allsec Technologies have visited so far and many number of students got placed. Till now, the highest package is 4 LPA and the lowest is 2LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure of college is very nice in terms of classrooms and labs, but there are also some minor defects such as some malfunctioning systems in labs and no Wi-Fi availability for students only internet is available and library is also nice with quiet environment. Studying area with sufficient systems is available for students use. But when it comes to hostel, the facilities are bare minimum and not so good. No cleanliness and no proper cleaning happens. Water tanks are filled with Algae not even suitable for drinking and many students were affected by skin problems. I recommend to take a room outside of college campus. Sports and games are nice, also NCC is a plus for our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Fests are so few. Placements are good. Teaching is perfect.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in 2023 in Computer Science and Technology. Wipro hired a lot of students in our college. The average package is 2 Lacs per annum. In our college, the maximum members are placed in college placements with an average package, suggesting our college for good campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi availability in our college for first-year students. Classrooms are under CC camera surveillance all the time. The library is available during college hours. Classrooms have projectors to explain programming languages. In the mess, the food is average, lunch is good, and dinner is not good. The canteen opens at 8 am and closes at 9 pm. Canteen products are good, and the food is good; prices are moderate. All games and sports are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because our college management is too good.

content.Placements: Nearly 70–75 percent of students were placed in our course. That's all credit goes to our college management. They are very supportive and encourage us during placement time. The highest package offered in my course is 8 LPA and the average package is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college management provides all the basic facilities and infrastructure. All classrooms are very neat and clean, fully furnished, with transport facility, parking facilities, etc. There are three canteens available inside the campus and the food is also not bad in the canteens.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with faculty members of our college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our college. Our college provides good placements. It conducts good placement drives. Many companies visit our college and conduct placement drives. Many students got placed in our course. Many students got internships. Our college provided good placements in 2022.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good hostel. Our college provides good facilities. All washrooms are very good. The mess is very good. It provides very good food. The hostel rooms are very clean and good. The infrastructure of the hostel is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is well-maintained and has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am satisfied with this course. Above 70% of students got placed in companies. Our college provides good placements with an average salary package of 3.5 LPA - 6 LPA. Our college authorities support us to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: All hostels have a pleasant and friendly environment. They are hygienic. They provide good food every day. They take care of us. Students like to stay in hostels.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very friendly. Their way of teaching is extremely high. They guide us very excellently in our exam preparations so that we can score very good marks. They teach subjects with live examples, so students can understand easily.

review_summary.college_name: Beehive College of Engineering and Technology (BCET, Dehradun) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is a college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: None of the students of civil engineering got placed from my batch. Students had to look for placements on their own. No company related to civil came here for placements. The roles are offered in site work, design work, quality check etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The food quality was good. Indoor and outdoor games were available. Gym is not available. The library contains the books of almost all the Indian authors during my tenure in the college. Classrooms were good, but smart classes were not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is an average.

content.Placements: Our college is the worst college I have ever seen. They don't provide any placements neither they call any company to the campus. They don't even provide internships, and they only want money. They charge a fine if students have a shortage of attendance. They always give the opportunity to Kashmir students because one student from Kashmir joins many students in our college. They also offer money of Rs. 25000 if they join one student.
content.Infrastructure: The library of our college is good, and the Wi-Fi is very slow, I think it is 1GB or less. The hostel is good, but the food served in the hostel is very bad. If you join the hostel, then you can't leave it. Even if you leave, they will charge you the fee.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I was a civil engineering student, and placements for my batch were not up to the mark. Hardly any company visited the college. Placements for other branches were okay. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. There is a placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Classrooms were neat and clean. Wi-Fi facility was available on the campus. Games like basketball, football, etc., were available in the college. The library was good with a vast collection of books. Medical facilities were available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is really good but place meant and faculty were not up to mark.

content.Placements: Beehive college is situated in Selaqui, Dehradun, Uttarakhand. 24 km from isbt Dehradun. You can reach here by Vikas Nagar bus, magic, tempo. Now came to main point placement, there is no placement for us and our senior since I joined the college. But this year some it sector companies visited my college and some students were placed in it. But for mechanical civil electrical there is no placement. The highest package for CSE department is about 2 Lacs gone. There is newly opened placement cell My college doesn't offer any internship. We have to go for internship for our own.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good campus environment and faculty.

content.Placements: The placements offered in my campus was average, and as well the senior students got the placements. But not all of them were placed. About 40% them were placed. The salary offered by the companies is about Rs. 14000-16000 per month as an average and the internship is also provided so that the student can easily gain the knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not much good but as on average. The medical facility is not much good. The sports facility in the college has a separate section for the sports, and the interested student can take part in the various activities of sports.

college_info.college_name: Anurag College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Anurag College of Engineering:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network but not very active

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Anurag College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Anurag College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,80,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Anurag College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in Engineering /B.Sc from recognised University.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed graduation from any recognised universityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed with minimum 50% Marks in Bachelor degree (B.E./B.Tech) in relevant discipline from a recognised Institute/University or on the merit in GATE/PGECET.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.
Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Anurag College of Engineering for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Anurag College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Anurag College of Engineering goes up to 705.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: At our college, almost all students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top roles offered are machine learning and data analysis.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs were available. Sports facilities are available. Our teachers encourage students in sports.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. Exams are conducted weekly to improve students' study habits and skills in the coming stages. The pass percentage is 70%.
review_content.Other: I chose this course because I have learned new things in CSE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied as ours will be the final batch.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not very high because of less students in our college. Percentage of placement in our college is around 60 percent. Recently, the highest package given was INR 8L per annum and the lowest package was of INR 2.6L per annum. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, tata. Around 40 percent of students got internship from ECE department. Top roles offered in our course are of technical support supervisor.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities and infrastructure available for our course are digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, computers labs and machine labs. There is no college hostel and some of our students stay in private hostels. Sports and games are available but only cricket and volleyball.

answer.text: Anurag College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Anurag College of Engineering has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Is Anurag College of Engineering a good college/Institute?

answer.text: Anurag College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in Engineering /B.Sc from recognised University.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed graduation from any recognised universityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed with minimum 50% Marks in Bachelor degree (B.E./B.Tech) in relevant discipline from a recognised Institute/University or on the merit in GATE/PGECET.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

overview_faqs.question: Is Anurag College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Anurag College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Anurag College of Engineering has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Anurag College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not available in our college.

content.Placements: Fifty percent of students are placed in the EEE department. L&T company recruits the top students, and all other companies participate in the placement. PLC SCADA and designing have the highest package of 12 LPAand the lowest package is 4 LPA. Forty-five percent of students are placed in L&T company.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is no compound wall, so it is an advantage. Latecomers and no dress code are followed. College classrooms are very clean and neat, and blackboards are very visible to every corner of students. Wi-Fi facilities are only for staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college but now, it has become an agricultural university.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and Accenture. Internships are not provided in our college. Top roles offered are software developer and engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were good and regularly conducted. Library consists of all the books. Classrooms are good. Hostel food is good. Medical facilities are available but games are not available.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were somewhat helpful. The course curriculum was good and understandable. Semester exams were good. The pass percentage was 40%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: At our college, almost all students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top roles offered are machine learning and data analysis.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were available. Sports facilities are available. Our teachers encourage students in sports.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. Exams are conducted weekly to improve students' study habits and skills in the coming stages. The pass percentage is 70%.
content.Other: I chose this course because I have learned new things in CSE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied as ours will be the final batch.

content.Placements: Placements are not very high because of less students in our college. Percentage of placement in our college is around 60 percent. Recently, the highest package given was INR 8L per annum and the lowest package was of INR 2.6L per annum. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, tata. Around 40 percent of students got internship from ECE department. Top roles offered in our course are of technical support supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities and infrastructure available for our course are digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, computers labs and machine labs. There is no college hostel and some of our students stay in private hostels. Sports and games are available but only cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Maybe 30% students were placed. The highest package was 4.5 LPA and the least was 1.8 LPA. Indian navy, TCS, Cognizant, etc. are the top recruiters. 80% students got internship and that too in core companies, but failed to provide placements in core companies. Companies like amritha tool crafts, range engine valves, etc. visit here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. We had each and every lab of respective subject. We had a good library. The quality of food is good at times but it is very bad sometimes. We have a readers' shop from where we can buy all the bakery items, junk food, soft drinks and all the stationery items.

admission_process.title: Anurag College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Anurag College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Anurag College of Engineeringoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,50,000 - 2,80,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good college but now, it has become an agricultural university.
reviews.review_text: Labs were good and regularly conducted. Library consists of all the books. Classrooms are good. Hostel food is good. Medical facilities are available but games are not available.

reviews.review_text: Labs were available. Sports facilities are available. Our teachers encourage students in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied as ours will be the final batch.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. We had each and every lab of respective subject. We had a good library. The quality of food is good at times but it is very bad sometimes. reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not at all there for all the computers except for few systems. Students do not have access to Wi-Fi. Labs are there but they are not fully functional. Most of the computers don't even work. For those systems that work are included with the required software. No hostel is available for the boys students. An hostel is there for the girls. Boys attend the college from the private hostel that are available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college because of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college environment is neat. The library is available in our college, and it contains all books for students to study. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are well-equipped. The hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, good faculty, good infrastructure and facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: It was nice with good environment, they provide a healthy atmosphere in classrooms, libraries, and labs. College environment was neat and clean, there were all books in library, for agriculture students there were field work also. Labs are quite good all systems works good. All electrical labs are good with equipment .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The library was well-equipped with all facilities and many books. Our college has many hostels for boys and girls. All hostels were very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good in the college. Quality is good of hostel with homely food and good cultural life style. The college maintains good women empowerment. Well maintained labs are present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I was absolutely satisfied with the college because of faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was not bad. On our campus, we had a well-maintained sanitary. We had a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were well maintained and we had a very good spacious library. We did not have any hostel on our campus. We had a spacious canteen and good ground.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am just satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are good but not very good because some of the equipment in labs do not work well. There is no canteen as of now. All the other facilities are comparatively good. The library is good and has almost all types of books.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides excellent teachers, good atmospheric environment, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, laboratories are provided, and in workshop there are 100 students. It provides a large auditorium. It has library with large collection of many different books and articles. The environment is also eco-friendly. Hostel facility for girls is also available. Transport facility is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average and has good surrounding but not good faculty and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are average. We have labs, a library, and equipment that are good in our college. We have a Wi-Fi facility for every department. Sports meets are conducted and we have a sports room where all indoor and outdoor required equipment are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its facilities, fests, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good for teaching, and the laboratories are good but not much high level in our college. The library facility was also there, and there was no Wi-Fi connection. There was no hostel facility and good sports were played in our college.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Lenora College of Engineering admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Lenora College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from stream like Engineering. College offers B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech. The Lenora College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 72,000 to 1,72,000.

review_content.General: Our college has good atmospheric classrooms and halls. Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus, and labs are pretty much good and clean. Our college library has all the books related to our course. Our hostel has great food quality, and medical facilities are available near our hostel. Rooms are superb and neat.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The review of Lenora College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: We have good placements so that one can study in this college. My seniors got placements on the campus. Around 25% of the students got selected on the campus interviews. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 6,000 per month and the higher salary is Rs. 12,000 per month. Only some companies visited my college but not at all. They provide internship for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In Lenora College of Engineering, 2nd shift Polytechnic has good faculty members to interact. The faculty members are friendly with the students, and they clarify the doubts. We have good classrooms and environment. They provide high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The library is good in which all books are available.

review_content.Other: Good environment and nice faculty. It is nice to spend the 4 years of my graduation here. The teaching methods by the faculty here are very good, they make sure that every student understands each and every thing taught to them. The only disadvantage is that it is a bit far from the city.

faqs.question: Q: Is Lenora College of Engineering good?

faqs.answer: Lenora College of Engineering offers undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in a variety of engineering streams. The quality education, innovative teaching methodologies, and robust infrastructure distinguish this institution. Several of its professors have advanced degrees and experience in industry.Lenora College has an established placement cell that copes with the top companies. Thus, adequate job opportunities are available in this college for the students. Apart from this, an environment for research and development is kept there so that the students can take part in various projects and competitions. The emphasis laid on holistic development, including extracurricular activities, is one of the reasons for young aspiring engineers to join this college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Lenora College of Engineering?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Lenora College of Engineering is around INR 70000 - INR 172000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Lenora College of Engineering good?
overview_faqs.answer: Hi,Lenora College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Lenora College of Engineering has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on Campus Life, 3.5 on Placements, 4 on Faculty and 2.75 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Lenora College of Engineering so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Lenora College of Engineering offers undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in a variety of engineering streams. The quality education, innovative teaching methodologies, and robust infrastructure distinguish this institution. Several of its professors have advanced degrees and experience in industry.Lenora College has an established placement cell that copes with the top companies. Thus, adequate job opportunities are available in this college for the students. Apart from this, an environment for research and development is kept there so that the students can take part in various projects and competitions. The emphasis laid on holistic development, including extracurricular activities, is one of the reasons for young aspiring engineers to join this college.

overview_faqs.question: Is Lenora College of Engineering a known institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Indeed, Lenora College of Engineering is an institute well-known in Southern parts of India. Established in the year 2008, it has been reputed for quality education and comprehensive engineering programs. It is affiliated to JNTUK-Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada. The institute offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in the field of engineering.Lenora College focuses on highly experienced teaching faculty, modern infrastructure, and research and development. The college has also an active placement cell keen to ensure job opportunities with some of the esteemed organizations for its students and raise its reputation.

review_summary.college_name: Lenora College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for pursuing engineering.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students were placed in our course. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 1.2 LPA and the average salary package offered is 1.8 LPA. Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Tata and Infosys are the top recruited companies in our course. The top role offered to the students is a technician. Almost 40% of the students from our course got an internship in companies like Tata, Tech Mahindra and Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good atmospheric classrooms and halls. Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus, and labs are pretty much good and clean. Our college library has all the books related to our course. Our hostel has great food quality, and medical facilities are available near our hostel. Rooms are superb and neat.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The review of Lenora College of Engineering.

content.Placements: We have good placements so that one can study in this college. My seniors got placements on the campus. Around 25% of the students got selected on the campus interviews. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 6,000 per month and the higher salary is Rs. 12,000 per month. Only some companies visited my college but not at all. They provide internship for the students.
content.Infrastructure: In Lenora College of Engineering, 2nd shift Polytechnic has good faculty members to interact. The faculty members are friendly with the students, and they clarify the doubts. We have good classrooms and environment. They provide high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The library is good in which all books are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Good environment and nice faculty. It is nice to spend the 4 years of my graduation here. The teaching methods by the faculty here are very good, they make sure that every student understands each and every thing taught to them. The only disadvantage is that it is a bit far from the city.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is in development every year. It is worth the money to choose this college.

content.Placements: Almost 84% of the students get placed on an average. The highest package offered is 4.2 LPA and the lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA. The top recruiting company is TCS. Top roles offered are communication lead and class representative. The highest package offered in our course is 4.2 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our course is 1.5 LPA. Almost 6.90% of students got an internship in companies like BSNL, BHEL, Mulesoft, in which we work for related networking and signal analysis.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure that college needs, and there is a good and pleasant atmosphere surrounding the college. There is an excellent communication lab where students are very passionate to go. As our college is located in south India, there is no doubt about the food. There is yummy food, and we love to eat there. There is an excellent quality food provided in the college. Hostel facilities are average, but they never compromise regarding the food quality.

admission_process.title: Lenora College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Lenora College of Engineering admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Lenora College of Engineering considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.Lenora College of Engineeringoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 72,000 - 1,72,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,00,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIET. Pros and cons of this college along with the campus details and placement details.

content.Placements: Hi, our college could not get any company for the placements. We requested them a lot for it, but all they kept saying was that they are trying. We then checked with our senior batch members and found out that the college could never get any company for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. It has got good two blocks, first small block for first-year students so that seniors should not rag them. The main block is where everyone from 2nd year to final year are found. Labs miss the main equipment that is required for the course. Systems in the labs are still running or Windows Millenium or Windows XP - too slow to run the apps. No Wi-Fi is available. The canteen here is lame with no proper food. The hostel is kinda good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014

content.Other: The teachers are best in the first year of b.tech but after that there is a lack of good professors in the final year. Mainly in major projects, due to which students who want to do projects don't know how and where to start and then they just buy the projects and show it to the project handler of the college. And also there is no placement drive in college so, student have to get the job on their own skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: Nizam Institute of Engineering and Technology has played a major role in the building of the nation by contributing to the advancement of knowledge and its application. Placement cell has been established with a team of members who are dedicated to create various recruitment opportunities for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: A college which is self-financial advantage and no dependency on others nice environment which gives nice knowledge and skillful subject knowledge (as per mechanical) with effective sources (comparative with minority institute). In laboratories we can see so much of effective equipment which are standard and present working conditions. As per my concern, my college faculty has shown us the effective part of project where no other college will take care about students like that.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Good facility and labs I am fully satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Nizam Institute of Engineering and Technology is good college and very nice camps in nalagonda near ramoji film city campus placement also good and management also very nice in college lectures are good with projector they explain nicely. The highest average is 96.4.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with good computer lab and mechanical labs and very big library with in campus and good canteen with Quality food and hostel facility also available and for transport purpose buses also available from hydrebad and form surrounding.

The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Nimra Institute of Science and Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nimra Institute of Science and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Nimra Institute of Science and Technology programmes is around INR 54,000 to 2,00,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Nimra Institute of Science and Technology has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Nimra Institute of Science and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
