faqs.answer: Nimra Institute of Science and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because there are no placements.

content.Placements: There is no guarantee for placements in my college because we, students, have many backlogs because of lack of perfect and quality education. Due to this, companies do not give chances to us. We are trying to clear our backlogs to attend placements.
content.Infrastructure: Nimra has great infrastructure I believe that our college would get the first rank if there exists any contest in infrastructure. Gardens, mango trees, grounds, cement road, and Sadhan block are more attractive in this college. The campus has a very cool climate. When you look around, you can see a lot of mountains, it would be more attractive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college because of the placements, care and help they provide.

content.Placements: In our college, the placements are increasing each year. Every year, on an average, 50% of the students were placing. The highest salary offered was 6.0 LPA. The average salary offered was 3.0 LPA. The lowest salary offered was 1.2 LPA. All MNC companies are visiting our college. Mostly, they offered the developers roles. There are no internships in our college. There is a placement cell in our college, which is very useful for placing the students in MNC company.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good. All kinds of books are available for each department students. We have a sports cell. Also, we participated in all sports events. Good food is available in our college canteen. We have separate hostel facilities for both girls and boys. Up to now, I never faced any problems with our college infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The waste of money and the future of the student.

content.Placements: There is no chance of the placements, better don't think about that. You can hardly see not even one company per year for the campus placements. In many MNCs, Nimra college is on the black list, so you cant get a job in MNCs. So, better not to think about the campus placements and the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: It is one of the most outstanding infrastructures in Vijayawada. They will maintain excellent outlook to attract the people. They will pay gardener a monthly package of 50K to keep the premises clean and green. No faculty will be paid that regular except the gardener.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is very good. I feel proud to be a part of it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am averagely satisfied from this college because the number of students are pretty less.

content.Placements: Students who have over 60% can get admission to our college. Packages between 5 and 10 LPA are offered. There are some big companies which recruit from here like Aditya Birla group of companies. While the percentage of students getting internships from my college is kind of low it is between 30-40%.
content.Infrastructure: There is no availability of hostel in my college but some separate quarters has been made for teachers and students both. But all of the other facilities are available. There is the availability of Wi-Fi on campus. All of the labs are well maintained. And have a pretty large library on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: My college is very good. I feel proud to be a part of it.

content.Placements: Approximately 75% of students got placed in our course. The highest package was 8 to 10 LPA, the lowest was 1 to 3 LPA, and the average package offered was 3 to 5 LPA. Companies like BMW Motors, Hindustan Machines Pvt. Ltd., and Tata Consultancy Services recruited students. More than 50% of students from our course got internships at Tata Consultancy Services. The roles offered included Manager, CEO, and Team Leader.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good. Facilities like food, rooms, and hygiene were very nicely. Curricular activities helped to keep the mind stress-free. Everything was maintained with 100% quality. The food prepared in the mess was good and delicious. Medical facilities were available 24/7.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college life as a B.Tech student.

review_content.Placements: Our campus is relatively new, and no placements have been done in our course yet. Our senior batch will be placed in the upcoming year. But as per other campuses, the highest package goes around 45 LPA, the lowest around 3 LPA, and the average is around 8 LPA. Infosys, Tata, and Wipro are some of the top recruiters. All of our senior batch got internships in our course, 100%. Data analyst is the top role offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very modern and unique, with state-of-the-art facilities. We have well-equipped classrooms, and Wi-Fi is fully functional. The library has extensive academic resources as well. They also offer e-books for our courses. Hostel quality is very nice, although the place where the hostel is situated is not good. The mess food and canteen are excellent. We have fully equipped medical facilities to handle emergencies. The sports and games are not very nice, as there is no ground for cricket, football, or basketball, but we have badminton courts, table tennis courts, and chess rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The NMIMS campus in the heart of Chandigarh and its academics, infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements have not yet taken place as the first batch of School of Technology Management and Engineering, NMIMS Chandigarh, will graduate in 2026. Yet many companies visit the campus for interactive sessions and expert talks for the students to acquaint them with the most in-demand skills in today's industry and train them for their upcoming career path.
review_content.Infrastructure: State-of-the-art infrastructure is present on the college campus. Labs like the computer labs, physics labs and 3D printing labs provide the students with hands-on experience and skills beyond their textbook knowledge. A well-maintained library, along with e-library resources, also aids students in their academic journey. High-teach classrooms with smart boards and sensor technology light systems in terms of sustainability norms enhance the learning experience of the students. Fresh food is available in the college cafeteria, which is highly nutritious and palatable. The college also provides provisions for various sports facilities like table tennis, badminton, chess, carrom and other indoor sports. A medical professional and a psychologist are also available on campus for the students to use in times of need. A high-speed Wi-Fi facility is also provided to the students on campus. The college hostel also provides these facilities, along with transport to and from the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Top-notch facilities with equal focus on academics and interpersonal skills.

review_content.Placements: The pioneer batch of STME will graduate in 2026, hence commenting on it will be misleading. But our placement cell is very active and many companies have visited our college. They have been conducting informative sessions for the development of interpersonal skills. Besides that there have been many guest lectures.
review_content.Infrastructure: STME, NMIMS, Chandigarh has top notch facilities when it comes to infrastructure, Wi-Fi, cafeteria, library, computer and other labs. From i5 core processors computers to egd labs they have it all. 3 printers, excellent network connection and variety of food. Hence, a good focus on not just academics but also the overall benefit of the students.

content.Placements: Our campus is relatively new, and no placements have been done in our course yet. Our senior batch will be placed in the upcoming year. But as per other campuses, the highest package goes around 45 LPA, the lowest around 3 LPA, and the average is around 8 LPA. Infosys, Tata, and Wipro are some of the top recruiters. All of our senior batch got internships in our course, 100%. Data analyst is the top role offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very modern and unique, with state-of-the-art facilities. We have well-equipped classrooms, and Wi-Fi is fully functional. The library has extensive academic resources as well. They also offer e-books for our courses. Hostel quality is very nice, although the place where the hostel is situated is not good. The mess food and canteen are excellent. We have fully equipped medical facilities to handle emergencies. The sports and games are not very nice, as there is no ground for cricket, football, or basketball, but we have badminton courts, table tennis courts, and chess rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The NMIMS campus in the heart of Chandigarh and its academics, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements have not yet taken place as the first batch of School of Technology Management and Engineering, NMIMS Chandigarh, will graduate in 2026. Yet many companies visit the campus for interactive sessions and expert talks for the students to acquaint them with the most in-demand skills in today's industry and train them for their upcoming career path.
content.Infrastructure: State-of-the-art infrastructure is present on the college campus. Labs like the computer labs, physics labs and 3D printing labs provide the students with hands-on experience and skills beyond their textbook knowledge. A well-maintained library, along with e-library resources, also aids students in their academic journey. High-teach classrooms with smart boards and sensor technology light systems in terms of sustainability norms enhance the learning experience of the students. Fresh food is available in the college cafeteria, which is highly nutritious and palatable. The college also provides provisions for various sports facilities like table tennis, badminton, chess, carrom and other indoor sports. A medical professional and a psychologist are also available on campus for the students to use in times of need. A high-speed Wi-Fi facility is also provided to the students on campus. The college hostel also provides these facilities, along with transport to and from the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Top-notch facilities with equal focus on academics and interpersonal skills.

content.Placements: The pioneer batch of STME will graduate in 2026, hence commenting on it will be misleading. But our placement cell is very active and many companies have visited our college. They have been conducting informative sessions for the development of interpersonal skills. Besides that there have been many guest lectures.
content.Infrastructure: STME, NMIMS, Chandigarh has top notch facilities when it comes to infrastructure, Wi-Fi, cafeteria, library, computer and other labs. From i5 core processors computers to egd labs they have it all. 3 printers, excellent network connection and variety of food. Hence, a good focus on not just academics but also the overall benefit of the students.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a better college because of good faculty members, placements and well infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of the students got internships in recognised companies like Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro, etc. They are now going to work in respected companies with better salaries and comfortable jobs. reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied in teaching but totally dissatisfied because of no placements in 2016.

review_content.Placements: This college campus has a large silent area. In the college, the teaching is good. The lectures are friendly to discuss the topics. Talking about the recruitment, no companies will come to the college for hiring the students. There is no good management system in this college, and we faced many problems in getting buses. The canteen facility is worse, and there is no south Indian food. During summer, there are no any extra classes for GATE exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about the infrastructure, it is an average building. The classes are not bad, and the labs are not much good. There is sufficient equipment in all the labs, but we got less practical knowledge in the labs during all the semester. The lectures will give less practical knowledge in the respective subject, and there is no good management for lab facility.

review_summary.college_name: Basavakalyan Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The future of Basavakalyan Engineering College.

content.Placements: The Basavakalyan college provides only drives, which will be helpful to make our course complete. But they will not provide any company interviews. I want to tell students to take admission in colleges that provide placements to companies, but not in colleges that do not give placements.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, we had good labs, and Wi-Fi is available in the labs. In the library, we can find any material. But in the college, there is no facility of good washrooms. They conduct very few fests, and there are no tours or picnics. Very few sports competitions are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Placements are not good for mechanical engineering students, but our stream students have been selected for the CSR drive conducted by JSpiders, Bangalore. Few students are selected for free IT full-stack developer courses.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure is average. Classrooms are better. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Laboratories are average. It also provides a good library. The food served in the canteen is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful in making our career but few teachers are not knowledgeable. The teaching quality is better. Our syllabus is not good, and it does not make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are very difficulty. The pass percentage is 35%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a better college because of good faculty members, placements and well infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students got internships in recognised companies like Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro, etc. They are now going to work in respected companies with better salaries and comfortable jobs. After gaining work experience, they will earn lacks of money and well respect in their life.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was very good at providing good food and other necessities. The campus provided us with knowledge on how to manage events in a proper way and importance of sports in our life. On the campus, Wi-Fi facility was available during college time. Classrooms were air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied in teaching but totally dissatisfied because of no placements in 2016.

content.Placements: This college campus has a large silent area. In the college, the teaching is good. The lectures are friendly to discuss the topics. Talking about the recruitment, no companies will come to the college for hiring the students. There is no good management system in this college, and we faced many problems in getting buses. The canteen facility is worse, and there is no south Indian food. During summer, there are no any extra classes for GATE exam.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about the infrastructure, it is an average building. The classes are not bad, and the labs are not much good. There is sufficient equipment in all the labs, but we got less practical knowledge in the labs during all the semester. The lectures will give less practical knowledge in the respective subject, and there is no good management for lab facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The lecturers are young. They are un-experienced, and every student cant gets placed.

content.Placements: We get placements but not in big MNC companies but in small companies which are yet growing. They provide salary between Rs 20,000-30,000 per month. The students who are good in seminars and study, etc., will get good placements with good salary. The companies like Pompei, etc., visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and library are not good as they show on their websites. The library doesn't contain good books which are required for us. Our college conducts sports every year. Talking about Wi-Fi, it is a bit slow. As per my consideration, Wi-Fi is not required as everybody uses Jio. Hostels are in good condition, and the mess food is also provided with good quality. Some queries are there regarding the infrastructure, but they can be ignored.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

faqs.answer:
A:    ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.BCACandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 3-years Engineering Diploma or passed B.Sc and class 12th with Mathematics and obtained minimum 60% marks in aggregate are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate with grace marks are not allowed for admission.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.MCACandidate must have passed Mathematics at 10+2 level or Graduation level. 
Candidates with grace marks are not allowed for admission.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/Institute.
The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.

reviews_list.review_title: I am partially dissatisfied with faculty and placements but very happy with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: A very few students got placed from our college, and there are approximately 10%-15% placements in our college. Students started working with a salary package of 1.5 LPA. About 2 companies visited our college to offer placements for us, and they offered students jobs in very far away places. The top role offered is a site engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and well maintained here. The canteen has everything which we needed, but there are no medical facilities. The ground is available, but it doesn't look like a playground. Practical lab-type shops are available for doing practicals.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The best faculty and infrastructure for students.

review_content.Placements: The placements of students are conducted according to their 3rd and 4th semesters marks without any backlogs. Every year, approximately 25 students from each branch get placed from the college. Every year, approximately 10 reputed companies come to campus for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is quite nice, and much discipline is maintained on the college campus. All practical labs are equipped with new instruments which are used nowadays. There are a proper playground and activity area in the college. A gym is available for hostlers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: One of the best colleges in Aligarh which provides good faculty, infrastructure and results. Last year district topper was from our college. But when it comes to placement, college is not so good. I would suggest students only to study here and perform better in gate exam, so that you would get your job on your own. Now, coming to infrastructure, it is simple but not so praise worthy. Faculty members are good and experienced, they will help you to sort out your problems. But for poor students, like me this college is very good. They will help you at every moment. Whenever your fees is lacking they will give admit card to sit in semester exams.

courses.overview: ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies Courses & Fees 2025 There are a total of 23 courses offered at by the institute. These courses are offered across fields of Engineering and IT & Software, etc. They are available at the UG and PG levels. These courses include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA, MBA/PGDM, and MCA, etc. Admission to some of the programmes is subject to merit in the last qualifying exam and for some courses, admission is entrance-based. faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: The BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focuses on both theoretical lectures as well as practical work.With the help of lectures in the curriculum, theoretical concepts are introduced to students, tutorials provide space for solving problems and applications also.And the labs offer hands-on experience to students who get acquainted with equipment and CAD software. Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.
faqs.question: Q: Does BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies is a reputed institute for BBA, BCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies has a rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 2.3 on placements, 3.2 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college has only a few classes. Teachers do not fully meet your requirements.

content.Placements: No good companies have visited this college for many years, but there may be a possibility because the director of our college has changed. According to my estimation, no big company has come to our college till date. If any companies have visited, they were very small ones.
content.Infrastructure: The fee of this hostel is very normal and its fee is Rs. 6,000 in which very few facilities are provided. Food is served three times a day. Wi-Fi of our hostel is 4G which provides very normal speed. College hostel has also become very old. As I told this hostel is very normal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best institute in Aligarh.

content.Placements: It is the top institute in terms of placements. Every year around 70-80 percent students get the placement. The highest and the lowest package offered in my course are 8 LPA and 2 LPA respectively. Roles offered in my course are very good. Top recruiting companies for my course are INFOSYS, WIPRO and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is very good. This institute is less with all the facilities like digital classrooms, high security CCTV cameras, high-speed Wi-Fi and other facilities. Hostels are very good. Mess food is very hygienic and healthy. Medical facility is also provided to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I am partially dissatisfied with faculty and placements but very happy with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: A very few students got placed from our college, and there are approximately 10%-15% placements in our college. Students started working with a salary package of 1.5 LPA. About 2 companies visited our college to offer placements for us, and they offered students jobs in very far away places. The top role offered is a site engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and well maintained here. The canteen has everything which we needed, but there are no medical facilities. The ground is available, but it doesn't look like a playground. Practical lab-type shops are available for doing practicals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The best faculty and infrastructure for students.

content.Placements: The placements of students are conducted according to their 3rd and 4th semesters marks without any backlogs. Every year, approximately 25 students from each branch get placed from the college. Every year, approximately 10 reputed companies come to campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is quite nice, and much discipline is maintained on the college campus. All practical labs are equipped with new instruments which are used nowadays. There are a proper playground and activity area in the college. A gym is available for hostlers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014

admission_process.title: ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theACN College of Engineering and Management Studiesapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, and more. To know about the eligibility of ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies courses, students can visit the website.

ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies admission:

hostel_campus.college_name: ACN College of Engineering and Management Studies Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
College campus provides well-furnished hostel accommodation to its students.The girls hostel has triple seater rooms and the boys hostel preferences are given to first year students. College bus service is also available from the out-of-campus hostels.
Both the hostels have gymnasium as well as indoor and outdoor sports facilities.

library.description: The Library opens from 8.30 AM to 9.00 PM, Monday to Saturday. It has a huge collection of books on engineering, science, and humanities through its various divisions with CDs, DVDs, and Audio cassettes. The library opens up to 12 o’clock midnight before and during the minor and major examinations for students.
